calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 10,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Stephen Paul Brunner, Esq. representing the plaintiff presents evidence. Plaintiff's counsel states that his witness resides in Ohio and court waives appearance. Court signs judgment for plaintiff as follows: Principal: $13,816.34; Fees: $1,697.50; Costs: $482.43 for a total judgment of $15,996.27. Judgment signed in open court.

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2002 Continued To Oct-11-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing, Declaration Of Shawntee R. Jackson In Support
